title: Arlo Tyre
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmayd|the Rebel Master Scout sent to Alashan|the name Arlo|[[Arlo (disambiguation)]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:ArloTyre.png]] |name=Arlo Tyre |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[Alashan]][[Star Wars Weekly 108|''Star Wars Weekly'' 108]] |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Star Wars Weekly 107|''Star Wars Weekly'' 107]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Whaddya say we pull out and call for help?''"
"''No reason to just yet, Wadie. Back me up. I'm moving in for a closer look.|Arlo Tyre and Wadie Firestone|}} '''Arlo Tyre''' was a [[Gender/Legends|man]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] after an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] raid cost him everything he held dear. He became a Master [[Scout/Legends|Scout]] and was partnered with [[Wadie Firestone]]. [[Standard year|Years]] after the raid, the pair were sent to [[Mission to Alashan|investigate]] the loss of communications with an archeological team on [[Alashan]]. Despite being a seasoned veteran, Tyre was [[Death/Legends|killed]] investigating the ruins, cut down by a mysterious beam of energy. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=World of Fire!|book=Star Wars Weekly 107|reprint=1}} {{1st}} *{{StoryCite|story=Star Terror!|book=Star Wars Weekly 108|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} *{{StoryCite|story=Molten Doom!|book=Star Wars Weekly 109|reprint=1}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|I||Firestone, Wadie}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tyre, Arlo}} [[Category:Alliance Military members]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Scouts]]
